title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for improving productivity with Claude Code: using LLM knowledge bases, implementing auto-research workflows, and applying context engineering. The video demonstrates practical application of these principles for software development acceleration.
